Mach, Inc. announced today that Alan Shipman been named President Identification Tracking Group replace Zuilhof, retiring June.
Through Technology Labeling Systems (LSI) brands, Mach's Identification Tracking Group designs manufactures labeling, coding, marking systems, peripherals, labels wide range industries custom applications.
Identification Tracking Group employs over people across seven manufacturing facilities dozens regional support locations throughout North America.
Shipman will lead operations provide strategic direction business unit, which regional offices manufacturing facilities throughout United States Canada.
most recently served Technology's Vice-President General Manager.
began career with Technology nearly years South Central Regional Manager also served several years Vice-President Sales.
Before joining Technology employed with Accenture Consulting.
Shipman will report Mach President Mark Anderson.
Zuilhof founded Fort Worth based Technology 1993 grew company from regional labeling equipment reseller world's largest manufacturers integrators identification tracking equipment, products, services.
Zuilhof sold Technology Mach, Inc. 2002 joined company President lead Identification Tracking business.
Under leadership Mach's Identification Tracking Group's rapid growth been fueled innovative product service development steady addition regional offices responsive, cost-effective customer support.
past years, Identification Tracking Group added multiple label converting facilities regional offices United States Canada become North America's premier single source manufacturer integrator labeling, coding, marking solutions.
near future, Zuilhof will continue serve Mach advisory role.
